text.title: Elicitation Techniques Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying elicitation-techniques. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.root-cause: BA drafts question to confirm pre-existing belief.
antipattern.fix: Use behavioral-grounded open prompts; review interview guide for leading phrasing.

antipattern.root-cause: Time pressure: BA pushes single-interview insight.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥2 supporting_sessions per req_stub; block synthesis if only one source.

antipattern.root-cause: Author skips consent under schedule pressure.
antipattern.fix: Reject artifact; restart session with consent.
Apply remote-workshop-toolkit four-role protocol; reject unstructured breakouts.
